name: zyx1121
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by zyx1121.

plugins.name: scriptorium
plugins.description: Self-maintained LLM wiki for teams. PostgreSQL + MCP-over-HTTP. Based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

plugins.name: utils
plugins.description: Self-growing personal CLI toolbox. Hooks observe ad-hoc scripts and propose new commands; the CLI grows where it's actually used.

plugins.name: chronicle
plugins.description: Auto-write daily/weekly Claude Code journals from your sessions, prompts, and git activity. The 6th layer of the agentic stack — the one that finally writes about you.
